command_log.command: mkdir -p .wheel/outputs/team-test && echo 'Team static test started' > .wheel/outputs/team-test/setup.txt && echo 'Setup complete'

WHEEL_LIB_DIR="/Users/ryansuematsu/.claude/plugins/cache/yoshisada-speckit/wheel/000.000.000.876/lib" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/workflow.sh" && WORKFLOW=$(workflow_load "workflows/tests/team-static.json") && WF_NAME=$(echo "$WORKFLOW" | jq -r '.name') && STEP_COUNT=$(echo "$WORKFLOW" | jq '.steps | length') && STATE_FILE=$(ls -t .wheel/state_*.json 2>/dev/null | head -1 || true) && if [[ -n "$STATE_FILE" && -f "$STATE_FILE" ]]; then CURRENT_CURSOR=$(jq -r '.cursor' "$STATE_FILE") && CURRENT_STEP_ID=$(echo "$WORKFLOW" | jq -r --argjson idx "$CURRENT_CURSOR" '.steps[$idx].id // "complete"') && echo "Workflow '$WF_NAME' started ($STEP_COUNT steps)." && echo "State file: $(basename $STATE_FILE)" && echo "Current step: $CURRENT_STEP_ID (cursor=$CURRENT_CURSOR)"; else echo "Workflow completed during kickstart."; fi
for w in worker-1 worker-2 worker-3; do echo "--- $w ---"; cat .wheel/outputs/team-test-static-team/$w/result.md 2>/dev/null || echo "(no result yet)"; done
for w in worker-1 worker-2 worker-3; do echo "--- $w ---"; ls .wheel/outputs/team-test-static-team/$w/ 2>/dev/null; done
ls .wheel/state_*.json 2>/dev/null | while read sf; do echo "$(basename $sf): cursor=$(jq -r '.cursor' "$sf") status=$(jq -r '.status' "$sf") wf=$(jq -r '.workflow_name' "$sf")"; done
for w in worker-1 worker-2 worker-3; do echo "--- $w ---"; cat .wheel/outputs/team-test-static-team/$w/result.md 2>/dev/null || echo "(no result)"; done
for w in worker-1 worker-2 worker-3; do echo "--- $w ---"; ls -la .wheel/outputs/team-test-static-team/$w/ 2>/dev/null; done

ls -la .wheel/state_*.json 2>/dev/null && echo "---" && ls -t .wheel/history/success/ 2>/dev/null | head -3 && echo "---" && ls -t .wheel/history/stopped/ 2>/dev/null | head -3 && echo "---" && ls -t .wheel/history/stale/ 2>/dev/null | head -3

.wheel/outputs/team-test/results/worker-1/worker-1/result.md
.wheel/outputs/team-test/results/worker-2/assignment.json

.wheel/outputs/team-test/results/worker-2/result.md
.wheel/outputs/team-test/results/worker-2/worker-2/assignment.json
.wheel/outputs/team-test/results/worker-2/worker-2/context.json
.wheel/outputs/team-test/results/worker-2/worker-2/result.md

.wheel/outputs/team-test/results/worker-3/worker-3/context.json
.wheel/outputs/team-test/results/worker-3/worker-3/result.md

command_log.command: echo '## Static Team Test Results' && echo '' && echo 'Summary:' && cat .wheel/outputs/team-test/summary.json 2>/dev/null | jq -r '.completed_count, .failed_count' && echo '' && echo 'Collected outputs:' && find .wheel/outputs/team-test/results/ -type f 2>/dev/null | sort
